prose.en: Use technical controls to ensure that only authorized software libraries, such as specific .dll, .ocx, and .so files, are allowed to load into a system process. Block unauthorized libraries from loading into a system process. Reassess bi-annually, or more frequently.
Technical controls are used to ensure that only authorized software libraries, such as specific .dll, .ocx, and .so files, are allowed to load into a system process.
Unauthorized libraries are blocked from loading into a system process.
Authorized libraries are reassessed bi-annually, or more frequently.
